provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content: This Act may be cited as the Actions for Smoke Damage (Prohibition) (Repeal) Act.

provisions.title: Repeal of Cap. 327 of the old edition
provisions.content: The Actions for Smoke Damage (Prohibition) Act is hereby repealed. Contact us Visit our Facebook Page Visit our Twitter/X profile About ZambiaLII ZambiaLII is a pioneer in the free access to law movement and serves as a reliable and timely source of judicial decisions, legislation and statutory instruments. Since 2012, ZambiaLII has been hosted by the Southern African Institute for Policy and Research (SAIPAR) , an independent, educational and development-oriented research centre.
